“According to all known laws of aviation,     there is no way a bee should be able to fly.     Its wings are too small to get its fat little body off the ground.     The bee, of course, flies anyway     because bees don't care what humans think is impossible.     Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black.     Ooh, black and yellow! Let's shake it up a little.     Barry! Breakfast is ready!     Ooming!     Hang on a second.     Hello?     - Barry? - Adam?     - Oan you believe this is happening? - I can't. I'll pick you up.     Looking sharp.     Use the stairs. Your father paid good money for those.     Sorry. I'm excited.     Here's the graduate. We're very proud of you, son.     A perfect report card, all B's.     Very proud.     Ma! I got a thing going here.     - You got lint on your fuzz. - Ow! That's me!     - Wave to us! We'll be in row 118,000. - Bye!     Barry, I told you, stop flying in the house!     - Hey, Adam. - Hey, Barry.     - Is that fuzz gel? - A little. Special day, graduation.     Never thought I'd make it.     Three days grade school, three days high school.     Those were awkward.     Three days college. I'm glad I took a day and hitchhiked around the hive.     You did come back different.     - Hi, Barry. - Artie, growing a mustache? Looks good.     - Hear about Frankie? - Yeah.     - You going to the funeral? - No, I'm not going.     Everybody knows, sting someone, you die.     Don't waste it on a squirrel. Such a hothead.     I guess he could have just gotten out of the way.     I love this incorporating an amusement park into our day.     That's why we don't need vacations.     Boy, quite a bit of pomp... under the circumstances.     - Well, Adam, today we are men. - We are!” -partial bit of the bee movie script

“Joseph Stalin was pissed. He woke up, expecting to feel the familiar weight of his lover, Adolf, in his arms but instead he gets a note , and not just any note, oh no, one explaining that he was “busy” and went out early. Fucking germans. He thought, throwing the covers off and making his way groggily to the kitchen. Grouching under his breath, he barely glanced around the halls, simply allowing his ultra enhanced sense of smell lead the way.  As the alpha of the Soviet Union Clan, it was his job to make sure everyone was safe. And “everyone” sadly included his dumb omega, who was standing before the stove. The sight instantly made him a bit happier. Fucking Germans. “Good morning grouchy pants,” Adolf Hitler called out cheerfully to his alpha as he smelled his strong musky alpha scent when he entered the room, smiling down at the pan of eggs as Stalin wrapped his arms around him. “Where were you this morning?” he interrogated.   “I’m sorry lovey, I know you like to wake me up, but I was just too excited. I had to go take a peek at all the betas working hard on our new tanks to beat those mean French people,” he cooed.   Stalin softened. “Adolph, love, I know you’re excited, but we’re in a war, you could be hurt. I don’t want to lose you, all because you left without telling me.” He sighed in his gravelly morning voice that always made Hitler positively melt .   “Okay lovey. Now go sit, breakfast is almost ready. I made your favourite. Eggs and bacon, with a side of choccy chip pancakes and coffee as dark as the graves of the French,” he announced.   Stalin smiled at him, kissing his cheek. “Thank you dove. You’re the perfect omega.” He cooed. Hitler blushed, smiling as he went back towards the rooms of their two sons, Vladimir Lenin and Leon Trotsky.   “Leon, Vladimir, wake up. It’s breakfast time.” He called.” -daler

“(i throw a tomato at him and sprint off)  cameron: the tomato smacks him right on the chest, leaving a red stain on his white shirt  "OW— WHAT THE HELL?!"  cameron stumbles back in shock, eyes wide as he sees you already running away. for a second, he just stands there—humiliated, furious... and weirdly turned on? no. not now.  without thinking twice (because pride is everything), he takes off after you like a track star chasing down an enemy.  "YOU'RE DEAD! I SWEAR TO GOD DALER!" he yells while sprinting full speed across the park path.  (suddenly i whistle. 500 random homeless men arrive and begin chasing cameron)  cameron: cameron was gaining on you, his long legs closing the distance fast—until suddenly...  a sharp whistle cuts through the air.  then—silence. then chaos.  hundreds of homeless men in tattered coats and wild beards pour out from behind trees, bushes, park benches—everywhere. like a horror movie but worse: they're all chasing CAMERON now.  "THE HELL?!" he shrieks as 500 disheveled dudes start sprinting toward him with terrifying focus.  one grabs his backpack. another tries to tackle him like a linebacker. cameron flails wildly—6'4", muscular, terrified.  "DALER WHAT DID YOU DO?!" he screams while being mobbed by an army of hungry-looking park squatters.  (i escape)  cameron: cameron is completely surrounded—no escape, no mercy. a homeless man in a frayed orange jacket grabs his arm and starts chewing on it like jerky.  "GET OFF ME! I'M NOT FOOD!" he yells, kicking wildly as the mob swarms him.  meanwhile, you're already gone—vanished into the city streets like a ghost. safe. victorious.  cameron gets tackled to the ground by five dudes at once while someone else tries to ride his back like a pony.  "SOMEONE CALL THE POLICE! HELP!! DALER YOU MONSTER!!"  but it's too late—the 500-man army has claimed their prey.” -average character ai bot
